top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to fall as Trump yet to green light Iran peace deal
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. Oil has nudged a touch higher to $93 per barrel this morning as uncertainty continues to cloud any prospect of a peace deal in the Middle East. The latest peace proposal between the US and Iran was said last week to be awaiting on the [...]

top_signals.title: Risk Rally Powers Past Iran Stalemate | The Asia Trade 6/1/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Sydney with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Hiab Agrees to Acquire Truck Maker Labrie for $1.04 Billion
top_signals.summary: Finnish-listed Hiab Oyj has agreed to acquire refuse collection vehicle manufacturer Labrie Environmental Group at an enterprise value of $1.04 billion, strengthening its position in the North American waste and recycling market.

top_signals.summary: The government imposes a nonbinding "ban" on the recruitment of new graduates every year until May 31 to allow students the opportunity to focus on their studies.
